key.runicskills.title: Runic Skills
yacl3.config.runicskills:config.enableIt: Master toggle for the item-lock feature. If off, every entry in runicskills.lockItems.json5 (and every integration-generated lock) is ignored — players can use any item regardless of skill level.
yacl3.config.runicskills:config.maxActiv: Maximum number of perks a player can have enabled at once. 0 = unlimited (default). Server-authoritative; clients exceeding the cap are rejected. Iron's Spells school attunements count against this cap in addition to ironsMaxSchoolSelections.
yacl3.config.runicskills:config.disabled: Perk registry names to disable. Disabled perks cannot be enabled or ranked up; existing ranks remain in save data but their effects are suppressed. Accepts registry path ("berserker") or full id ("runicskills:berserker").

Passive registry names to disable. Disabled passives cannot be leveled up and their attribute modifier is removed on next /skillsreload, login, or respawn. Existing level is retained. Accepts registry path ("attack_damage") or full id ("runicskills:attack_damage").
yacl3.config.runicskills:config.perkSwap: Per-player cooldown (in ticks, 20 = 1 second) between enabling perks. 0 = no cooldown (default). Applies only when enabling a perk from rank 0; rank-ups and disables bypass it. Server-authoritative.
yacl3.config.runicskills:config.skillLev: Multiplier on the vanilla XP cost of leveling a skill. 1.0 = vanilla (default). 2.0 = twice as expensive. 0.5 = half price. Scales both the XP-points cost and the minimum-experience-level gate.
yacl3.config.runicskills:config.logError: If true, when populating the items a extra check will be made, if a item have a incorrect format it will log the line and continue loading without crashing
yacl3.config.runicskills:config.closeCra: If true, when trying to craft a non unlocked item, it will close the crafting the menu
yacl3.config.runicskills:config.dropLock: If true, locked items will be automatically dropped from player hands. Has no effect when enableItemLocks is off.
yacl3.config.runicskills:config.logTaczG: TAC:Zero have a special id system, so if you wanna get the id to restrict you need to enable this and shoot.
yacl3.config.runicskills:config.logSpell: Iron's Spell 'n Spellbooks have a unique spell id for each spell, so if you wanna get the id to restrict you need to enable this and cast the spell.
yacl3.config.runicskills:config.playersM: Global max level, the global level is calculated summing all skills level, so if this is set to 32 players will be able to only maximize 1 skill.
config.cloth-config.runicskills.lockItem:
How to add a lock item:
<Mod name>§b:§f<Item name>§b#§f<Skill>§b:§f<Level>

If you want add more skills just write: (you can add as many as you want)
<Mod name>§b:§f<Item name>§b#§f<Skill>§b:§f<Level>§b;§f<Skill>§b:§f<Level>§b...§f

If you want make the item droppable just add to the final §b<droppable>§f like this example:
minecraft§b:§ftotem_of_undying§b#§fconstitution§b:§f16§b;§fmagic:12§b<droppable>
config.cloth-config.runicskills.treasure:
How to add a treasure item:
<Mod name>§b:§f<Item name>

If you wanna add a nbt use §b{ }§f like this example:
<Mod name>§b:§f<Item name>§b{§fNBT§b}§f

Finally we have list, the list is if you got a treasure chance you will get 1 item from the list, to adding a list write:
<Name list>§bList[§f Here you can put as many items as you want, to separate them use §b;§f to close the list just use §b]§f
config.cloth-config.runicskills.converge:
How to add a convergence item: (to make it fair the convergence only will give you 1 result)
<Mod name>§b:§f<Item name>§b#§f<Mod name result>§b:§f<Item name result>

perk.runicskills.botania_petal_reader.de: An herbalist's memory: examined flowers surrender their secrets, displaying a hidden function tooltip on any plant you inspect.
perk.runicskills.botania_rune_of_mana_re: The rune hum answers yours. Mana-holding items in your inventory carry %s%% more than their etched capacity.
perk.runicskills.botania_sparkle_sense.d: Magical blocks and entities within %s blocks briefly shimmer when you look at them — the world's hidden glyphs become legible.
perk.runicskills.botania_dowsers_twig.de: A willow-switch memory of ore veins. Crouch-activate to reveal nearby ores for %ss (cooldown %ss).
perk.runicskills.botania_green_thumb.des: Rustic hands coax an extra harvest from leaves and wildflowers — 1-in-%s drops are doubled.
perk.runicskills.botania_livingbark_stud: You listen to the wood before you cut it. Logs chopped have a %s%% chance to yield a bonus sapling.
perk.runicskills.botania_agricultors_eye: A farmhand's sight for growth rhythm: crops and functional flora wear their inner tick-progress as a visible indicator overhead.
perk.runicskills.botania_foragers_palate: Every meal teaches. Eating any food grants +%s%% XP gain for %ss.
perk.runicskills.botania_loot_hunters_in: A treasure-diver's nose. Activate to reveal structure chests within %s blocks for %ss through walls.
Silence is a kind of sight. While sneaking, hostile entities within %s blocks register on your mind's compass.
The gaze of the Monocle, inscribed into your vision. Mana bursts within %s blocks become visible through walls.
Use /know <item> to tally any item across inventories within %s blocks — your library of the unseen.
perk.runicskills.botania_cartographer.de: Greed makes cartographers of us all. A tappable heatmap reveals nearby ore density for %ss.
perk.runicskills.botania_far_reach.descr: Pride extends your arm. Interaction reach is increased by %s blocks.
perk.runicskills.botania_lazy_swap.descr: Sloth has its own efficiencies. Breaking a block auto-swaps your hotbar to the correct tool.
perk.runicskills.botania_mirrors_read.de: Envy sees everything. Other players within %s blocks reveal their held item and armor tier on tooltip.
perk.runicskills.botania_elven_knowledge: The portal to Alfheim rewards those who would learn. A chapter of three bonus perks opens on first attunement.
perk.runicskills.botania_gaias_witness.d: Having stared into your own reflection and won, the Wisdom tree grants you one extra perk slot thereafter.
perk.runicskills.botania_oracle_nine_run: Hover your perk book over any block and it names the block's magical affinity and mana-throughput tier.
perk.runicskills.botania_inner_wellsprin: A wellspring beneath your ribs. Any Mana Pool within reach trickles %s mana per half-second into your inventory items.
perk.runicskills.botania_tidewoven.descr: Rain-soaked, your rune songs cost less. While wet or in rain, mana costs are discounted by %s.
perk.runicskills.botania_emberheart.desc: An ember at the heart of every strike. Attacks deal an extra %s fire damage.
perk.runicskills.botania_stone_rooted.de: While standing on stone-family blocks, you gain +%s armor — the earth protects its own.
perk.runicskills.botania_featherstep.des: Wind takes your weight. Fall damage is multiplied by %s.
perk.runicskills.botania_band_of_aura.de: A ring's slow breath. %s mana per half-second is trickled into your inventory's mana-holding items from the background generators you own.
perk.runicskills.botania_verdant_pulse.d: Once per %ss, a %s-block bone-meal aura radiates from you — the Agricarnation's gift, worn on the skin.
perk.runicskills.botania_solar_conduit.d: Daylight flows through you. Ability damage is increased by %s%% during the day.
perk.runicskills.botania_harvest_tithe.d: Kills pay the autumn's tithe. A %s%% chance on kill to drop a bonus vanilla gem or nugget.

perk.runicskills.botania_lens_velocity.d: A lens of wind. Your projectiles and spells travel %s%% faster.
perk.runicskills.botania_lens_potency.de: A lens of weight. Your next ability every %ss strikes for %s× damage.
Small wild things take your side. %s%% chance on being hurt to summon an allied pixie that strikes the aggressor.
perk.runicskills.botania_cake_combustion: The table never ends. Eating food over your hunger cap yields Regeneration for %ss.
perk.runicskills.botania_magnetite.descr: Items come when they're called. A %s-block item magnet drags loot toward you; sneaking disables it.
perk.runicskills.botania_unbound_step.de: The world's drag has a blind spot for the idle. Soul sand, cobweb, and slime no longer slow you.
Incoming blows carry a return message. %s%% of damage you take is reflected back to its source.
Pride's signature. Attack and interaction range grow by %s blocks.
perk.runicskills.botania_thundercall.des: Wrath leaves an arc on the air. Critical hits roll a %s%% chance to chain lightning to another nearby foe.
perk.runicskills.botania_relic_attunemen: An Aesir relic of your choice attunes to a perk slot instead of a curio slot, freeing one for another bauble.
perk.runicskills.botania_terrasteel_asce: Terrasteel's green gift carried on the bone. +%s max HP, +1 armor toughness, saturation decays 30%% slower.
perk.runicskills.botania_flugels_grace.d: Triple jump with safe landing, and a short sprint-dash cooldown. (Up to %s mid-air jumps.)
perk.runicskills.botania_manastorm.descr: A personal mana overload. Once per %ss, detonate a radial pulse scaling with your current mana (×%s when a nearby pool feeds the blast).
